# Borderless Trips

Borderless Trips is a premium travel agency based in London, UK, specializing in Schengen visa services, luxury holiday packages, and personalized travel bookings (flights, hotels, and custom travel planning). It features a 95%+ visa approval success rate.

## Main Services
- **Schengen Visa Consultation**: Guided process, document verification checklist, application form review, and interview coaching.
- **Holiday Packages**: Specially curated vacation packages to premier European destinations (Paris, Rome, Barcelona, Santorini, Amsterdam, Zurich, etc.).
- **Flight Bookings**: Reservation generation and verified itineraries.

## Core Navigation Routes
- [Home Page](https://borderlesstrips.com/) - Main entry point, services outline, testimonials, and visa eligibility quiz.
- [About Us](https://borderlesstrips.com/about) - Agency background, vision, and core mission.
- [Schengen Visa Services](https://borderlesstrips.com/visa-services) - Comprehensive information on Schengen visas and eligibility guidelines.
- [Holiday Packages](https://borderlesstrips.com/holiday-packages) - Curated vacation package selection list.
- [Flight Bookings](https://borderlesstrips.com/flights) - Flight booking inquiry search system.
- [Travel Blog](https://borderlesstrips.com/blog) - Travel guide resources, visa checklists, and budget advice.
- [Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)](https://borderlesstrips.com/faq) - Help section answering common travel and visa questions.
- [Contact Support](https://borderlesstrips.com/contact) - Contact form, address, phone numbers, and office locations.
- [Track Visa Application](https://borderlesstrips.com/track) - Live tracking interface for visa applications.

- [Privacy Policy](https://borderlesstrips.com/privacy-policy)
